  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"刷新 Token"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/auth/refresh-token"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



刷新 Token

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"App-Version","in":"header","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{App-Version}}"},"description":"应用版本号"},{"name":"Sys-Type","in":"header","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Sys-Type}}"},"description":"系统类型"},{"name":"Phone-Model","in":"header","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Phone-Model}}"},"description":"手机型号"},{"name":"Device-Unique-Id","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Device-Unique-Id}}"},"description":"手机终端唯一 ID（app自己提供的）"},{"name":"ClientId","in":"header","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{ClientId}}"},"description":"客户端 ID，后续用于推送"},{"name":"Lang","in":"header","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Lang}}"},"description":"语言，中文使用 zh-CN，英文使用 en-US"},{"name":"Time","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","example":1710000000000},"description":"时间戳（毫秒）"},{"name":"Nonce","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","minLength":32,"maxLength":32,"example":"1234567890abcdef1234567890abcdef"},"description":"32 个字符的随机数"}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["refreshToken"],"properties":{"refreshToken":{"type":"string","description":"刷新令牌"}},"title":"RefreshTokenRequest"}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>
